metadata.note: Monetary amounts ignored by design. Output is regulation matching, confidence, abstention, and conflict judgment only; numeric values stay as engine placeholders for the deterministic engine downstream.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the treasury shares number reflects an active capital transaction with profit-generating activity, or is purely a balance-sheet reclassification without economic substance.
Determine if the treasury shares are held for resale or reissuance, and if so, whether any profit or loss arises from such activity.
classifications.narrative_template: This capital position of {{engine:amount}} is not associated with any active profit-generating activity under DIPN 21; no source-of-profits rule applies.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the 'Ordinary Shares Number' represents a capital account or a transactional position.
Determine if there is any active trading or profit-generating activity associated with this shareholding.
Clarify whether the shares are held for investment purposes or as part of an operational business.
classifications.narrative_template: This capital position of {{engine:amount}} is not linked to any active profit-generating activity and does not reflect a transactional flow subject to DIPN 21 source-of-profits rules.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the issuance of shares involves any profit-generating activity or is purely a capital transaction without income flow.
Determine if the share issuance was conducted in connection with a trading, service, or financing activity that could generate taxable profits under DIPN 21.
classifications.narrative_template: This capital position of {{engine:amount}} arises from share issuance and does not reflect an income-generating activity under DIPN 21; no source-of-profits rule applies.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether 'Net Debt' represents a financial instrument with active interest accrual or is merely a static balance-sheet aggregation.
Determine if the debt instruments underlying 'Net Debt' are actively managed or serviced in any jurisdiction, including HK, DE, or US.
classifications.narrative_template: This line item is a balance-sheet position with no clear income-generating activity; no DIPN 21 source-of-profits rule applies without further evidence of operational or profit-generating activity.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the debt is part of a financing arrangement with a HK-based entity or subsidiary.
Determine the location where the loan agreements were negotiated, approved, and funded.
Clarify if the debt is held by a financial institution and whether it qualifies as an offshore loan under DIPN 21.
classifications.narrative_template: This loan position of {{engine:amount}} is assessed under the applicable DIPN 21 rules; the source of profits depends on the location of key financing activities.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the 'Tangible Book Value' line item represents an active business asset generating profits or is purely a balance-sheet residual.
Clarify if any profit-generating activity (e.g., trading, manufacturing, services) is associated with the tangible assets reflected in this line item.
classifications.narrative_template: The line item 'Tangible Book Value' is a balance-sheet position without an identifiable income-generating activity. No DIPN 21 source-of-profits rule applies as it does not reflect profits from trading, services, financing, or other taxable activities.

cross_border_conflict.note: Same tax-relevant base reported in multiple jurisdictions.

retrieved_rules.source_citation: Inland Revenue Department DIPN 21 (Revised), Paragraph 45(a) & (b) - Other Profits
retrieved_rules.reasoning: The line item 'Land And Improvements' is a balance-sheet position representing a capital asset. While it does not represent an active profit-generating transaction, it is directly related to real estate, which is governed by HK_DIPN_21_REAL_ESTATE. This rule states that profits from the sale of real estate are sourced at the location of the property. Therefore, the source of any future profit from the sale of this land and improvements would be determined by the physical location of the property, which may fall within one or more of the candidate jurisdictions. The rule applies because the asset is inherently tied to real estate, even if no current income is generated.

evidence_requests: Confirm the physical location of the land and improvements.
Determine whether any sale or development activities are planned for this asset.
classifications.narrative_template: This capital asset of {{engine:amount}} is assessed under the cited rule; the source of any future profit from its disposal is determined by the location of the property.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the 'Properties' line item represents active real estate operations (e.g., leasing, development, sale) or is purely a balance-sheet holding with no ongoing profit-generating activity.
If active, identify the physical location(s) of the properties and whether any rental or sale transactions are conducted in HK or other jurisdictions.
classifications.narrative_template: The 'Properties' line item is a balance-sheet position with no clear income-generating activity; further evidence is required to determine if it qualifies as a source of taxable profits under DIPN 21.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the 'Current Assets' line item includes any active profit-generating components such as inventory, receivables from trading, or securities subject to active management.
Determine if any portion of the current assets represents income-producing activities (e.g., trading inventory, marketable securities) that could trigger DIPN 21 sourcing rules.
classifications.narrative_template: This balance-sheet line item of {{engine:amount}} is not a flow-based income or expense; it represents a static position and does not reflect a profit-generating activity under DIPN 21.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the hedging assets represent active trading or financial instruments generating profits, or are merely balance-sheet adjustments without income-generating activity.
Clarify if the hedging activities are conducted in HK or elsewhere, and whether they involve the performance of services or transactions that generate taxable profits under DIPN 21.
classifications.narrative_template: This balance-sheet position of {{engine:amount}} does not reflect an active profit-generating activity and is not governed by any DIPN 21 source-of-profits rule.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the restricted cash is held in connection with an active business operation or is purely a balance-sheet reserve with no ongoing profit-generating activity.

classifications.narrative_template: This balance-sheet position of {{engine:amount}} is not associated with any active profit-generating activity and therefore does not fall under any DIPN 21 source-of-profits rule.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the prepaid assets represent prepayments for future services, goods, or other economic benefits with a clear income-generating activity.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the inventory item represents a trading asset actively managed for sale in the ordinary course of business.

Clarify whether the inventory is part of an active trading or manufacturing operation, or merely a balance-sheet holding with no current income-generating activity.
classifications.narrative_template: This balance-sheet item of {{engine:amount}} does not represent an active profit-generating transaction and therefore falls outside the scope of DIPN 21 source-of-profits rules.

evidence_requests: Confirm whether the 'Finished Goods' line item represents inventory held for sale or is part of ongoing production, and whether any profit-generating activity (e.g., sale, transfer, or processing) is currently being conducted in relation to these goods.

classifications.narrative_template: This balance-sheet position of {{engine:amount}} does not reflect an active profit-generating transaction and is therefore not governed by any DIPN 21 source-of-profits rule.
